scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: cd e2e && npx playwright test smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:e2e:smoke
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.format:all: npm run format:frontend && npm run format:backend
scripts.format:check: cd frontend && npm run format:check && cd ../backend && ruff format --check .
